---
title: "Eduardo Ramirez"
---

# **<u>Education</u>**
### California State University, Long Beach
- *B.A. in Geography (Graduating May 2026)*
- **Relevant Coursework**: Intro to Geospatial Techniques; Intro to Digital Cartography; Geospatial Science for Health; Land Use Planning

### Cerritos College (Norwalk, CA)
- *Associate of Arts in Geography (December 2022)*
- *Associate of Science in Natural Sciences (December 2022)*

# **<u>Professional Experience</u>**
### **Aspire Public Schools (Los Angeles, CA)**
#### *Newcomer and Attendance Support Specialist (September 2025 - Present)*
- Serve as the primary attendance and student-support liaison for multiple Aspire school sites across the Los
Angeles region.
- Analyze attendance datasets, monitor trends, and generate reports used by regional leadership to evaluate school
performance.
- Identify patterns in attendance data to support early interventions and improve student engagement.
Maintain and organize electronic datasets and documentation to ensure accuracy and compliance with school and
district policies.
- Coordinate with school-site administrators and staff to implement targeted strategies that improve student
attendance and engagement.
- Conduct family outreach to address barriers affecting school attendance.

### **Aspire Public Schools (Los Angeles, CA)**
#### *Office Administrative Assistant/Family Coordinator (February 2023 - September 2025)*
- Contributed to reducing chronic absenteeism from 34.2% to 25.1% through outreach and engagement initiatives.
- Maintained spreadsheets and electronic records used for reporting and operational tracking.
- Coordinated parent workshops, conferences, and school community engagement events.
- Supported PBIS initiatives focused on improving school climate and student engagement.
- Provided administrative and technical support for school staff and daily office operations.

### **American Financial Network (Downey, CA)**
#### *Junior Loan Processor (December 2020 - June 2022)*
- Reviewed borrower income, credit reports, property documentation, and insurance records to ensure accuracy and
underwriting readiness.
- Maintained digital loan files and organized documentation for efficient review and processing.
- Verified financial records and supporting documentation to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements.
- Coordinated communication between loan officers, underwriters, and clients to facilitate loan processing.
- Managed multiple loan applications simultaneously while maintaining accuracy and attention to detail.

# **<u>Technical Skills</u>**
- ArcGIS
- Spatial analysis
- Data management
- Project management/coordination
- Microsoft Excel
- Spatial data visualization
- Data analysis and reporting
- Research and technical writing
- Bilingual (Spanish & English)

# **<u>Awards & Honors</u>**
- Teammate of the Year - Aspire Public Schools (2025)
